---
title: "Practical AI for biomedical researchers"
image: "../../images/pipes.png"
author: HeaDS
Organizers: HeaDS
date: 2026-10-19
Dates: "19 October 2026"
Location: "University of Copenhagen"
categories: [AI, LMM, RAGs]
description: "Register soon"
---

Register: **Opening soon**.

Learning objectives:

- Understand conceptually how AI models work, particularly Large Language Models (LLMs). 
- Evaluate outputs and limitations from AI models critically.  
- Understand the trade-offs between accessing models via providers or locally. 
- Make better use of AI for scientific tasks involving searching, summarization, ideation and programming.
